channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-18T21:31Z — 1537 outages, 141,356 customers, 153 fair-weather, 16 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 5053 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | BGE: 4574 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 4114 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 3743 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | BGE: 3214 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
